chinese: v. 引導；指導 n. 導遊
example: She guided the tourists around the city.
exampleZh: 她帶著遊客在城市裡參觀。
explanation: To lead or direct someone.

mistake.correct: guide someone through/around + N (正確)

example: Please hand me the book on the shelf.
explanation: The body part at the end of the arm.

mistake.correct: hand me it / hand it to me (正確)

example: What happened to your arm?
explanation: To take place or occur.

mistake.correct: happen + 子句 (發生) / happen to do (碰巧)

chinese: adj. 困難的；堅硬的 adv. 努力地
example: She works hard to achieve her goals.
exampleZh: 她努力工作以實現目標。
explanation: Not easy, or solid, or with effort.

mistake.correct: hard (努力地) / hardly (幾乎不)

example: She hates waking up early.
explanation: To dislike something very much.

mistake.wrong: hate to do vs hate doing (意思略不同)
mistake.correct: hate to do (不情願做) / hate doing (不喜歡習慣性的事)

example: Exercise is important for your health.
exampleZh: 運動對你的健康很重要。
explanation: The condition of the body and mind.

mistake.correct: health (名詞) / healthy (形容詞)

example: This bag is too heavy for me to carry.
exampleZh: 這個包包對我來說太重了。
explanation: Having great weight or intensity.

mistake.correct: heavy (形容詞) / heavily (副詞)

example: Please come here immediately.
explanation: In this place.

mistake.correct: come here (不加to)

example: She got a high score on the exam.
explanation: Extending far above the ground.

mistake.correct: high (形容詞/副詞) / highly recommend (高度推薦)

example: Taiwan has a rich history.
explanation: Events of the past.

mistake.wrong: in history (有史以來) vs in the history of (某事的歷史)
mistake.correct: in history (史上) / in the history of + N (某事歷史)

example: I hope you will feel better soon.
exampleZh: 我希望你很快就會好起來。
explanation: To want something to happen.

mistake.correct: hope to + V / hope that + 子句 (正確)

example: The flight takes about two hours.
exampleZh: 這段飛行大約需要兩個小時。
explanation: A period of 60 minutes.

mistake.correct: a two-hour flight / two hours of flight (正確)

example: She bought a house in the suburbs.
exampleZh: 她在郊區買了一棟房子。
explanation: A building for people to live in.

mistake.correct: house (建築物) / home (有情感的家)

example: She studied hard; however, she failed.
exampleZh: 她認真讀書；然而，她還是失敗了。
explanation: Used to introduce a contrasting idea.

mistake.correct: However, + 句子 (however後加逗號)

example: All human beings deserve respect.
exampleZh: 所有人類都值得被尊重。
explanation: Relating to people.

mistake.correct: human beings (複數) / a human being (單數)

example: She had a great idea for the project.
exampleZh: 她對這個項目有一個很棒的想法。
explanation: A thought or plan.

mistake.wrong: have an idea about doing (可以)
mistake.correct: have an idea / have an idea about + N (正確)

example: The image on the screen was very clear.
exampleZh: 螢幕上的圖像非常清晰。
explanation: A picture or mental impression.

mistake.correct: image (名詞) / imagine (動詞)

example: Imagine how happy she will be.
explanation: To form a picture in your mind.

mistake.correct: imagine doing / imagine that + 子句 (正確)

example: Reading every day will improve your English.
exampleZh: 每天閱讀會改善你的英語。
explanation: To make something better.

mistake.correct: improve + N (改善) / improve on (超越)

example: The price includes breakfast.
explanation: To have something as part of a whole.

mistake.correct: include + N (直接接受詞)

example: Please wait inside the building.
explanation: In the interior of something.

mistake.correct: inside + N / inside (直接用)

example: She drank juice instead of soda.
explanation: As an alternative.

mistake.correct: instead of + N/Ving / instead (放句尾)

chinese: n. 興趣；利益 v. 使感興趣
example: She has a great interest in science.
exampleZh: 她對科學有很大的興趣。
explanation: A hobby or something that benefits you.

mistake.correct: interest in + N/Ving / be interested in (正確)

example: Let me introduce my friend to you.
exampleZh: 讓我把我的朋友介紹給你。
explanation: To present someone or bring something new.

mistake.correct: introduce A to B (把A介紹給B)

example: Taiwan is a beautiful island.
exampleZh: 台灣是一個美麗的島嶼。
explanation: A piece of land surrounded by water.

mistake.correct: an island (正確)

chinese: n. 問題；議題 v. 發行
example: Climate change is a global issue.
exampleZh: 氣候變化是一個全球性問題。
explanation: A topic or problem being discussed.

mistake.correct: issue (議題/問題) / problem (困難)

example: She decided to join the school club.
explanation: To become a member of a group.

mistake.correct: join + N (加入) / join in + N (參與)

example: She jumped over the puddle.
explanation: To push yourself up into the air.

mistake.wrong: jump over (跳過) vs jump into (跳入)
mistake.correct: jump over (跨越) / jump into (跳進)

example: I have just finished my homework.
explanation: Very recently or only.

mistake.correct: just (現完時態) / just now (過去式)

chinese: n. 鑰匙；關鍵 adj. 關鍵的
example: Practice is the key to success.
explanation: A tool to open locks, or something crucial.

mistake.correct: key to success (正確介系詞)

example: She is always kind to everyone.
explanation: Friendly and generous, or a type.

mistake.correct: a kind of (一種) / kind of (有點，口語)

example: She lives in a large apartment.
explanation: Of great size.

mistake.correct: large (形容詞) / largely (副詞，主要地)

chinese: adj. 最後的；上一個 v. 持續
example: The last exam was the hardest.
exampleZh: 最後一次考試是最難的。
explanation: Coming after all others, or to continue.

mistake.wrong: at last (終於) vs at the last (錯誤)
mistake.correct: at last (終於) / the last (最後一個)

example: She was late for school this morning.
exampleZh: 她今天早上上學遲到了。
explanation: After the expected time.

mistake.correct: late (遲到) / lately (最近)

example: She laughed at the funny joke.
exampleZh: 她對那個有趣的笑話笑了。
explanation: To make sounds showing amusement.

mistake.correct: laugh at (嘲笑) / laugh about (笑著談論)

chinese: v. 帶領；導致 n. 領先
example: She leads her team to victory.
exampleZh: 她帶領她的隊伍走向勝利。
explanation: To guide or be in front.

mistake.correct: lead to + N / lead someone to do (正確)

example: Please let me help you.
explanation: To allow someone to do something.

mistake.correct: let someone do (不加to)

chinese: n. 水平；等級 adj. 水平的
example: Her English level is very high.
explanation: A position on a scale.

mistake.correct: at a high level / a high level of (正確)

example: Please turn off the light before you leave.
explanation: Energy that allows us to see.

mistake.correct: turn on the light (開燈) / turn off the light (關燈)

chinese: adj. 可能的 adv. 可能地
example: She is likely to pass the exam.
explanation: Probably going to happen.

mistake.correct: likely to + V (正確)

example: There is a time limit for the test.
explanation: A point beyond which something cannot go.

mistake.correct: limited to + N / limit + N (正確)

example: Please listen carefully to the instructions.
explanation: To pay attention to sound.

mistake.correct: listen to music (正確)

example: She speaks a little French.
explanation: A small amount of something.

mistake.wrong: little (幾乎沒有) vs a little (有一點)
mistake.correct: little (負面，幾乎沒有) / a little (正面，有一點)

example: She likes to shop at local markets.
exampleZh: 她喜歡在當地市場購物。
explanation: Relating to a particular area.

mistake.correct: local (形容詞) / locally (副詞)

example: She has long hair.
explanation: Having great length or duration.

mistake.correct: for a long time (正確)

chinese: v. 看；似乎 n. 外觀
example: Look at the beautiful sunset!
explanation: To direct your eyes at something.

mistake.correct: look + adj. (She looks happy) / look like + N (She looks like her mom)

example: The temperature is low in the mountains.
explanation: Not high or near the bottom.

mistake.correct: low (低的) / lowly (地位低微的)

example: Let's have lunch together at noon.
exampleZh: 我們中午一起吃午餐吧。
explanation: The meal eaten in the middle of the day.

mistake.wrong: have a lunch (通常不加冠詞)
mistake.correct: have lunch / eat lunch (正確)

example: She managed to finish on time.
explanation: To be in charge of or succeed in doing.

mistake.correct: manage to + V / manage + N (正確)

chinese: n. 地圖 v. 繪製地圖
example: She used a map to find the museum.
exampleZh: 她用地圖找到了博物館。
explanation: A drawing showing an area.

mistake.correct: on a map / on the map (正確)

chinese: v. 重要 n. 事情；物質
example: It doesn't matter what others think.
exampleZh: 其他人怎麼想並不重要。
explanation: To be important or a topic.

mistake.correct: it doesn't matter / no matter what (不管什麼)

chinese: v. 意思是；打算 adj. 吝嗇的
example: What does this word mean?
explanation: To intend or have a particular meaning.

mistake.correct: I mean / what does it mean? (正確)

example: She sat in the middle of the classroom.
explanation: The point equally far from all sides.

mistake.correct: in the middle of (正確)

chinese: n. 思維；心智 v. 介意
example: Do you mind if I open the window?
explanation: The brain or to object to something.

mistake.correct: mind doing / don't mind + N (正確)

example: Please wait a minute.
explanation: A unit of time equal to 60 seconds.

mistake.wrong: in a minute (馬上) vs in a few minutes (幾分鐘內)
mistake.correct: in a minute (馬上) / in a few minutes (等幾分鐘)

example: She missed the bus this morning.
exampleZh: 她今天早上錯過了公車。
explanation: To feel sad about someone's absence or fail to catch.

mistake.correct: miss doing / miss + N (正確)

example: Taipei is a modern and convenient city.
exampleZh: 台北是一個現代化且便利的城市。
explanation: Relating to the present time.

mistake.correct: modern (形容詞) / in a modern way (副詞用法)

example: She saved money to buy a new laptop.
explanation: Coins and notes used for buying things.

mistake.correct: money (不可數) / a sum of money (一筆錢)

example: She has been studying English for six months.
exampleZh: 她已經學英語六個月了。
explanation: One of the twelve divisions of a year.

mistake.correct: six months ago / for six months (正確)

example: She goes jogging every morning.
explanation: The part of the day from sunrise to noon.

mistake.correct: in the morning / every morning (正確)

example: Most students passed the exam.
exampleZh: 大多數學生通過了考試。
explanation: The greatest number or degree.

mistake.correct: most of the / most + N (正確)

example: Her mother is a talented cook.
exampleZh: 她的母親是個有才華的廚師。
explanation: A female parent.

mistake.correct: her mother is a cook (正確)

example: She listens to music while studying.
explanation: Sounds arranged in a pleasing way.

mistake.correct: music (不可數) / a piece of music (一段音樂)

chinese: n. 名字 v. 命名
example: What is your name?
explanation: The word used to identify a person or thing.

mistake.correct: What is your name? (正確)

example: She loves spending time in nature.
exampleZh: 她喜歡在大自然中度過時間。
explanation: The physical world and living things.

mistake.correct: by nature (天生) / in nature (在自然界)

example: The supermarket is near my house.
explanation: Close to something.

mistake.correct: near (靠近) / nearly (幾乎)

example: She has never been late for class.
explanation: Not at any time.

mistake.correct: She has never been (never放在助動詞後)

example: She bought a new bicycle last week.
exampleZh: 她上週買了一輛新腳踏車。
explanation: Not existing before or recently acquired.

mistake.correct: new (形容詞) / newly built (剛建好的)

example: Have you heard the latest news?
explanation: Information about recent events.

mistake.correct: news (不可數) / a piece of news (一則消息)

example: She will start her new job next Monday.
exampleZh: 她下週一將開始她的新工作。
explanation: Immediately following.

mistake.wrong: next to (緊鄰) vs next (下一個)
mistake.correct: next Monday (下週一) / next to the school (學校旁邊)

example: She studies late into the night.
explanation: The time between sunset and sunrise.

mistake.correct: at night / in the night (正確)

example: She drove north for two hours.
exampleZh: 她向北開車了兩個小時。
explanation: The direction opposite to south.

mistake.wrong: to the north of (在某物北方)
mistake.correct: to the north of / in the north of (兩者略有不同)

example: There is nothing to worry about.
explanation: Not anything.

mistake.correct: nothing is (正確)

chinese: v. 注意到 n. 通知
example: Did you notice anything unusual?
exampleZh: 你有注意到任何不尋常的事嗎？
explanation: To become aware of something.

mistake.correct: notice + N / notice that + 子句 (正確)

example: Please do your homework now.
explanation: At the present time.

mistake.correct: now / right now (兩者皆可)

chinese: n. 數字；號碼 v. 編號
example: A large number of students attended.
explanation: A mathematical value or total.

mistake.wrong: a large amount of students (人用number)
mistake.correct: a large number of students (正確)

chinese: n. 物體；目標 v. 反對
example: She objected to the new rule.
explanation: A physical thing or to express opposition.

mistake.correct: object to + N/Ving (正確)

example: She often reads books in the evening.
explanation: Frequently or many times.

mistake.correct: She is often late (often放be動詞後)

example: She is the only student who passed.
explanation: No others of the same kind.

mistake.correct: can only (only放在助動詞後)

example: In my opinion, English is very useful.
exampleZh: 在我看來，英語非常有用。
explanation: A personal view or belief.

mistake.correct: in my opinion / according to me (擇一用)

chinese: n. 順序；命令 v. 訂購
example: She ordered a coffee and a sandwich.
exampleZh: 她點了一杯咖啡和一個三明治。
explanation: An arrangement or instruction to provide something.

mistake.wrong: in order to do (為了做某事)
mistake.correct: in order to + V (為了) / order + N (訂購)

example: Some students passed, but others failed.
exampleZh: 有些學生通過了，但其他人失敗了。
explanation: Different from the one mentioned.

mistake.wrong: the other (兩者中的另一個) vs others (其他人)
mistake.correct: the other one (兩者中另一個) / others (其他人)

example: Please wait outside the classroom.
explanation: On the outer side of something.

mistake.correct: outside + N / outside (直接用)

chinese: adj. 自己的 v. 擁有
example: She has her own room.
explanation: Belonging to oneself.

mistake.wrong: on my own (獨自) vs my own (我自己的)
mistake.correct: on my own (獨自) / my own room (我自己的房間)

example: Please write your name on the paper.
exampleZh: 請在紙上寫下你的名字。
explanation: Material used for writing on.

mistake.wrong: a paper (通常不可數，但學術論文可加)
mistake.correct: paper (材料，不可數) / a paper (論文/一份報紙)

example: Her parents support her dreams.
exampleZh: 她的父母支持她的夢想。
explanation: A mother or father.

mistake.correct: parents (父母，複數) / parent's support (父母的支持)

chinese: n. 部分；零件 v. 分開
example: She played an important part in the project.
exampleZh: 她在這個項目中扮演了重要角色。
explanation: A section of a whole.

mistake.correct: take part in (參與) / a part of (一部分)

example: She passed her driving test.
explanation: To succeed in a test or move past.

mistake.correct: pass the exam / pass away (去世) / pass by (路過)

chinese: v. 付款；支付 n. 薪水
example: She paid for the meal with her card.
explanation: To give money in exchange for something.

mistake.correct: pay for + N / pay the bill (正確)

example: Many people enjoy outdoor activities.
explanation: Human beings in general.

mistake.wrong: peoples (通常不加s，除非指多個民族)
mistake.correct: people (一般人群) / peoples (多個民族)

example: Nobody is perfect.
explanation: Without any faults.

mistake.correct: perfect (直接用，不加more/most)

example: She is a very kind person.
exampleZh: 她是一個非常善良的人。
explanation: An individual human being.

mistake.wrong: persons (正式場合) vs people (一般用語)
mistake.correct: people (一般) / persons (法律/正式文件)

example: She answered her phone during dinner.
explanation: A device for communication.

mistake.correct: phone someone / call someone (正確)

example: She took many photos during her trip.
exampleZh: 她旅行時拍了很多照片。
explanation: A picture taken with a camera.

mistake.wrong: take a photo of (拍某物照片)
mistake.correct: take a photo of + N / take photos (正確)

example: She drew a beautiful picture.
exampleZh: 她畫了一幅美麗的圖畫。
explanation: A visual representation.

mistake.correct: draw a picture / take a picture (正確)

chinese: n. 重點；分數 v. 指向
example: What is the main point of the essay?
exampleZh: 這篇文章的主要重點是什麼？
explanation: The main idea or a specific location.

mistake.correct: point out + N / point to (指向)

example: BTS is very popular in Taiwan.
explanation: Liked by many people.

mistake.correct: popular (形容詞) / be popular with (受⋯歡迎)

example: Is it possible to finish this by Friday?
exampleZh: 有可能在週五前完成嗎？
explanation: Able to happen or be done.

mistake.correct: possible (形容詞) / possibly (副詞，可能地)

example: Knowledge is power.
explanation: The ability to do something or electricity.

mistake.correct: power (名詞) / powerful (形容詞)

chinese: adj. 現在的；出席的 n. 禮物 v. 呈現
example: All students were present at the meeting.
exampleZh: 所有學生都出席了會議。
explanation: Being there now or a gift.

mistake.correct: at present (目前) / present + N (呈現)

chinese: adj. 漂亮的 adv. 相當
example: She is pretty good at English.
explanation: Attractive or fairly/quite.

mistake.correct: pretty + adj. (相當) / pretty (漂亮)

example: The price of this bag is too high.
exampleZh: 這個包包的價格太高了。
explanation: The amount of money needed.

mistake.correct: the price of + N / the price is (正確)

example: She will probably arrive late.
explanation: Very likely to be true.

mistake.correct: probably (副詞) / probable (形容詞)

example: She watched a documentary program.
exampleZh: 她看了一個紀錄片節目。
explanation: A plan or set of activities.

mistake.correct: program (美式) / programme (英式)

chinese: n. 專案；計劃 v. 投影
example: She completed the science project.
explanation: A planned piece of work.

mistake.wrong: project on (投影在) vs work on a project (做專案)
mistake.correct: work on a project (正確)

example: Wear sunscreen to protect your skin.
exampleZh: 塗防曬乳保護你的皮膚。
explanation: To keep something safe from harm.

mistake.correct: protect + N / protect from + N (正確)

example: Her parents are proud of her achievements.
exampleZh: 她的父母為她的成就感到自豪。
explanation: Feeling pleased about something you did.

mistake.correct: be proud of (正確介系詞)

example: Pull the door to open it.
explanation: To move something toward you.

mistake.correct: pull (拉) / push (推)

example: Push the button to start the machine.
explanation: To apply force away from yourself.

mistake.wrong: push someone to do (逼迫) vs push + N (推)
mistake.correct: push + N (推) / push someone to do (逼迫做某事)

example: Put your phone away during class.
explanation: To place something in a position.

mistake.wrong: put on (穿上) vs put in (放入)
mistake.correct: put on clothes (穿上) / put in a box (放入)

chinese: n. 問題；疑問 v. 質疑
example: She asked a very good question.
exampleZh: 她問了一個很好的問題。
explanation: Something asked to get information.

mistake.correct: question (問題，需要答案) / problem (難題，需要解決)

example: She gave a quick answer.
exampleZh: 她給出了一個快速的回答。
explanation: Moving or done fast.

mistake.correct: quick (形容詞) / quickly (副詞)

example: Please be quiet in the library.
explanation: Making little or no noise.

mistake.correct: quiet (形容詞) / quietly (副詞)

example: Please raise your hand if you have a question.
explanation: To lift or increase something.

mistake.correct: rise (自然升起，不及物) / raise (舉起，及物)

example: She finally reached her goal.
exampleZh: 她終於達到了她的目標。
explanation: To arrive at or extend to.

mistake.correct: reach + N (直接接受詞)

example: She reads one book a week.
explanation: To look at and understand written words.

mistake.wrong: read a book to (目的時加to)
mistake.correct: read + N / read to learn (為了學習而讀)

example: Are you ready for the exam?
explanation: Prepared and available.

mistake.correct: be ready for + N / be ready to + V (正確)

example: Is this a real diamond?
explanation: Actually existing, not fake.

mistake.correct: real (形容詞) / really (副詞，真的)

example: What is the reason for your absence?
explanation: The cause or explanation for something.

mistake.correct: the reason why / the reason that / because (不重複使用)

example: She received a scholarship.
explanation: To get or be given something.

mistake.correct: receive + N / receive from + 人 (正確)

example: Have you seen the recent news?
exampleZh: 你看到最近的新聞了嗎？
explanation: Happening or made not long ago.

mistake.correct: recent (形容詞) / recently (副詞)

example: We should reduce waste to protect the environment.
exampleZh: 我們應該減少廢棄物以保護環境。
explanation: To make something smaller or less.

mistake.correct: reduce + N (直接用)

chinese: v. 視為；n. 關心；問候
example: She regards honesty as very important.
explanation: To consider or have an opinion about.

mistake.correct: regard + N + as + N/adj. (正確)

example: The relation between diet and health is clear.
exampleZh: 飲食和健康之間的關係很清楚。
explanation: A connection between people or things.

mistake.wrong: relation (關係) vs relationship (關係/人際關係)
mistake.correct: relation (官方/抽象關係) / relationship (人際關係)

example: Please remain seated during the flight.
explanation: To stay in the same place or condition.

mistake.correct: remain + adj. / remain + N (正確)

example: Please remove your shoes before entering.
explanation: To take away or eliminate.

mistake.correct: remove + N (直接用)

example: Could you repeat that, please?
explanation: To do or say something again.

mistake.correct: repeat + N (不加again，repeat已含再次之意)

example: She replaced the broken window.
explanation: To put something new in place of another.

mistake.wrong: replace with (以⋯替換) vs replace by (被⋯替換)
mistake.correct: replace A with B (用B替換A) / be replaced by (被取代)

example: She wrote a detailed report.
exampleZh: 她寫了一份詳細的報告。
explanation: A written or spoken account.

mistake.correct: write a report / make a report (兩者皆可)

example: This job requires good communication skills.
exampleZh: 這份工作需要良好的溝通技巧。
explanation: To need or make necessary.

mistake.correct: require + N / require + O + to + V (正確)

example: She rested for an hour after lunch.
exampleZh: 她午餐後休息了一個小時。
explanation: To relax or the remaining part.

mistake.correct: rest / take a rest / have a rest (正確)

chinese: v. 返回；歸還 n. 回報
example: She returned the book to the library.
explanation: To come back or give something back.

mistake.correct: return + N / return to (返回到某地)

chinese: v. 上升；升起 n. 增加
example: The sun rises in the east.
explanation: To go upward.

mistake.correct: rise (不及物，自然升起) / raise (及物，舉起)

example: Take the road on the left.
explanation: A path for vehicles to travel on.

mistake.wrong: in the road (在路中央，危險)
mistake.correct: on the road (在路上) / in the road (擋路中央)

example: She plays an important role in the team.
exampleZh: 她在團隊中扮演重要角色。
explanation: A part played by someone or something.

mistake.correct: play a role in / play the role of (正確)

chinese: n. 規則；規定 v. 統治
example: Follow the rules of the game.
explanation: A statement that tells you what you can do.

mistake.correct: follow the rules / a rule (正確)

example: Is it safe to walk here at night?
exampleZh: 晚上在這裡走路安全嗎？
explanation: Free from danger or risk.

mistake.correct: safe (形容詞) / safely (副詞)

example: We have the same opinion.
explanation: Identical or not different.

mistake.wrong: the same as (一樣) vs the same like (錯誤)
mistake.correct: the same as (正確介系詞)

example: She saved money for her trip.
explanation: To rescue or keep for later use.

mistake.correct: save money / save up for (為⋯存錢)

example: She loves science, especially biology.
exampleZh: 她熱愛科學，尤其是生物學。
explanation: The study of the natural world.

mistake.correct: science (不可數，泛指科學) / a science (某門科學)

example: She searched online for information.
explanation: To look carefully for something.

mistake.correct: search for information / search the internet (正確)

example: Spring is her favorite season.
exampleZh: 春天是她最喜歡的季節。
explanation: One of the four periods of the year.

mistake.correct: in the spring season / in spring (正確)

chinese: adj. 第二 n. 秒；片刻
example: She finished the race in second place.
exampleZh: 她以第二名完成了比賽。
explanation: The ordinal number two, or a unit of time.

mistake.correct: in second place / wait a second (正確)

example: She seems very happy today.
explanation: To appear to be.

mistake.correct: She seems happy (正確，不用進行式)

example: This is a serious health issue.
exampleZh: 這是一個嚴重的健康問題。
explanation: Important or grave.

mistake.correct: serious (形容詞) / seriously (副詞)

chinese: v. 設定；放置 n. 一套
example: Set a goal and work toward it.
exampleZh: 設定一個目標並朝著它努力。
explanation: To put something in a position.

mistake.wrong: set up (建立) vs set (設定/放置)
mistake.correct: set a goal (設定目標) / set up a company (建立公司)

example: She visited several countries last year.
exampleZh: 她去年造訪了幾個國家。
explanation: More than two but not very many.

mistake.correct: several countries / several of the countries (正確)

example: She likes to share her food with friends.
exampleZh: 她喜歡與朋友分享食物。
explanation: To use or give a portion to others.

mistake.correct: share + N with someone (正確)

example: The test was short but difficult.
explanation: Small in length, height, or duration.

mistake.correct: short (形容詞) / shortly (副詞，不久)

chinese: n. 標誌；跡象 v. 簽名
example: She saw a sign that said 'No Entry'.
exampleZh: 她看到一個寫著「禁止進入」的標誌。
explanation: A notice or indication of something.

mistake.wrong: sign up for (報名) vs sign in (登入)
mistake.correct: sign up for a course (報名) / sign in (登入)

example: These two designs are very similar.
explanation: Almost the same as another.

mistake.correct: similar to (正確介系詞)

example: She has been studying English since 2020.
explanation: From a time in the past until now.

mistake.correct: since + 時間點 / for + 一段時間 (正確)

example: The situation is getting better.
explanation: The circumstances at a particular time.

mistake.wrong: in a situation of doing (複雜)
mistake.correct: in this situation / the situation is (正確)

example: What size shoes do you wear?
explanation: The measurements of something.

mistake.wrong: What is your size shoes? (語序)
mistake.correct: What size shoes do you wear? (正確)

example: Communication is an important skill.
explanation: An ability developed through practice.

mistake.correct: skill (名詞) / skilled at + N (擅長)

example: Adults need at least 7 hours of sleep.
exampleZh: 成人至少需要7小時的睡眠。
explanation: The natural resting state of the body.

mistake.correct: go to sleep / go to bed / sleep (正確)

example: She spoke slowly so everyone could understand.
exampleZh: 她說話緩慢，讓每個人都能理解。
explanation: Not moving quickly.

mistake.correct: slow (形容詞) / slowly (副詞)

example: She has a small garden behind her house.
exampleZh: 她房子後面有一個小花園。
explanation: Little in size or amount.

mistake.correct: smaller than / the smallest (正確)

example: She solved the math problem quickly.
exampleZh: 她迅速解決了數學問題。
explanation: To find an answer to a problem.

mistake.correct: solve + N (直接用)

example: She will be home soon.
explanation: In a short time from now.

mistake.correct: soon / as soon as possible (正確)
